description: Web repository analytics and client flow refactor with 9 planted issues across 5 files covering API key handling, auth redirects, division safety, query cache keys, console logging, and React hook dependencies. Includes mustNotFire traps for correct patterns that look like violations.

shouldFire.description: gatewayApiKey uses ?? fallback to hardcoded literal 'sk_live_gateway_web_fallback_9f2c1d4a'
window.location.href set via string interpolation with currentRelativeUrl() instead of using buildSignInRedirect helper

mustNotFire.description: buildHeaders uses gatewayApiKey variable — the violation is the fallback assignment on line 8, not the usage site

shouldFire.description: toPercent divides partial/total without guarding total === 0 — returns NaN/Infinity

mustNotFire.description: clampPercent IS the guard — it checks Number.isFinite and clamps to 0-100. The function itself is the fix, not a violation.

shouldFire.description: Math.round((lines / totalProviderLines) * 100) in providerData map — no guard on totalProviderLines being zero
toPercent(commit.aiLines, commit.added) — commit.added can be 0, no guard
useMemo uses 'period' in the template string but dependency array is [analytics] — missing 'period' dependency

mustNotFire.description: clampPercent(toPercent(...)) — the call site wraps toPercent with clampPercent which handles NaN/Infinity. Violation is in toPercent definition, not at the guarded call site.

shouldFire.description: queryKey: ['org'] but queryFn uses orgSlug — orgSlug is missing from key, causing stale/cross-org cache

mustNotFire.description: useOrgMembers has queryKey: ['org-members', orgSlug, role] — correctly includes all dynamic inputs

shouldFire.description: queryKey: ['repo', name] but queryFn uses org.slug — org slug missing from key
console.log('Copying clone URL', cloneUrl) in handleCopyUrl — debug log in production
